title: athyrium × bicolor
intro: Athyrium × bicolor, also known as the Lady Fern or Lady's Fern, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Athyrium genus of ferns, resulting from the cross between Athyrium filix-femina and A. angustum. The medicinal properties of Athyrium × bicolor include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. Athyrium × bicolor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
